rootHelpText:
[1m[38;2;255;90;45m🦞 OpenClaw[39m[22m [38;2;255;138;91m2026.4.1[39m [38;2;139;127;119m(b88592c)[39m
   [38;2;209;74;34mWe ship features faster than Apple ships calculator updates.[39m

[1m[38;2;255;90;45mUsage:[39m[22m openclaw [options] [command]

[1m[38;2;255;90;45mOptions:[39m[22m
  [38;2;255;176;32m--container <name>[39m   Run the CLI inside a running Podman/Docker container
                       named <name> (default: env OPENCLAW_CONTAINER)
  [38;2;255;176;32m--dev[39m                Dev profile: isolate state under ~/.openclaw-dev, default
                       gateway port 19001, and shift derived ports
                       (browser/canvas)
  [38;2;255;176;32m-h, --help[39m           Display help for command
  [38;2;255;176;32m--log-level <level>[39m  Global log level override for file + console
                       (silent|fatal|error|warn|info|debug|trace)
  [38;2;255;176;32m--no-color[39m           Disable ANSI colors
  [38;2;255;176;32m--profile <name>[39m     Use a named profile (isolates
                       OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR/OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH under
                       ~/.openclaw-<name>)
  [38;2;255;176;32m-V, --version[39m        output the version number

[1m[38;2;255;90;45mCommands:[39m[22m
  [38;2;139;127;119mHint: commands suffixed with * have subcommands. Run <command> --help for details.[39m
  [38;2;255;122;61macp *[39m                Agent Control Protocol tools
  [38;2;255;122;61magent[39m                Run one agent turn via the Gateway
  [38;2;255;122;61magents *[39m             Manage isolated agents (workspaces, auth, routing)
  [38;2;255;122;61mapprovals *[39m          Manage exec approvals (gateway or node host)
  [38;2;255;122;61mbackup *[39m             Create and verify local backup archives for OpenClaw
                       state
  [38;2;255;122;61mchannels *[39m           Manage connected chat channels (Telegram, Discord, etc.)
  [38;2;255;122;61mclawbot *[39m            Legacy clawbot command aliases
  [38;2;255;122;61mcompletion[39m           Generate shell completion script
  [38;2;255;122;61mconfig *[39m             Non-interactive config helpers
                       (get/set/unset/file/validate). Default: starts guided
                       setup.
  [38;2;255;122;61mconfigure[39m            Interactive configuration for credentials, channels,
                       gateway, and agent defaults
  [38;2;255;122;61mcron *[39m               Manage cron jobs via the Gateway scheduler
  [38;2;255;122;61mdaemon *[39m             Gateway service (legacy alias)
  [38;2;255;122;61mdashboard[39m            Open the Control UI with your current token
  [38;2;255;122;61mdevices *[39m            Device pairing + token management
  [38;2;255;122;61mdirectory *[39m          Lookup contact and group IDs (self, peers, groups) for
                       supported chat channels
  [38;2;255;122;61mdns *[39m                DNS helpers for wide-area discovery (Tailscale + CoreDNS)
  [38;2;255;122;61mdocs[39m                 Search the live OpenClaw docs
  [38;2;255;122;61mdoctor[39m               Health checks + quick fixes for the gateway and channels
  [38;2;255;122;61mgateway *[39m            Run, inspect, and query the WebSocket Gateway
  [38;2;255;122;61mhealth[39m               Fetch health from the running gateway
  [38;2;255;122;61mhelp[39m                 Display help for command
  [38;2;255;122;61mhooks *[39m              Manage internal agent hooks
  [38;2;255;122;61mlogs[39m                 Tail gateway file logs via RPC
  [38;2;255;122;61mmemory[39m               Search, inspect, and reindex memory files
  [38;2;255;122;61mmessage *[39m            Send, read, and manage messages
  [38;2;255;122;61mmodels *[39m             Discover, scan, and configure models
  [38;2;255;122;61mnode *[39m               Run and manage the headless node host service
  [38;2;255;122;61mnodes *[39m              Manage gateway-owned node pairing and node commands
  [38;2;255;122;61monboard[39m              Interactive onboarding for gateway, workspace, and skills
  [38;2;255;122;61mpairing *[39m            Secure DM pairing (approve inbound requests)
  [38;2;255;122;61mplugins *[39m            Manage OpenClaw plugins and extensions
  [38;2;255;122;61mqr[39m                   Generate iOS pairing QR/setup code
  [38;2;255;122;61mreset[39m                Reset local config/state (keeps the CLI installed)
  [38;2;255;122;61msandbox *[39m            Manage sandbox containers for agent isolation
  [38;2;255;122;61msecrets *[39m            Secrets runtime reload controls
  [38;2;255;122;61msecurity *[39m           Security tools and local config audits
  [38;2;255;122;61msessions *[39m           List stored conversation sessions
  [38;2;255;122;61msetup[39m                Initialize local config and agent workspace
  [38;2;255;122;61mskills *[39m             List and inspect available skills
  [38;2;255;122;61mstatus[39m               Show channel health and recent session recipients
  [38;2;255;122;61msystem *[39m             System events, heartbeat, and presence
  [38;2;255;122;61mtasks *[39m              Inspect durable background task state
  [38;2;255;122;61mtui[39m                  Open a terminal UI connected to the Gateway
  [38;2;255;122;61muninstall[39m            Uninstall the gateway service + local data (CLI remains)
  [38;2;255;122;61mupdate *[39m             Update OpenClaw and inspect update channel status
  [38;2;255;122;61mwebhooks *[39m           Webhook helpers and integrations

[1m[38;2;255;90;45mExamples:[39m[22m
  [38;2;255;122;61mopenclaw models --help[39m
    [38;2;139;127;119mShow detailed help for the models command.[39m
  [38;2;255;122;61mopenclaw channels login --verbose[39m
    [38;2;139;127;119mLink personal WhatsApp Web and show QR + connection logs.[39m
  [38;2;255;122;61mopenclaw message send --target +15555550123 --message "Hi" --json[39m
    [38;2;139;127;119mSend via your web session and print JSON result.[39m
  [38;2;255;122;61mopenclaw gateway --port 18789[39m
    [38;2;139;127;119mRun the WebSocket Gateway locally.[39m
  [38;2;255;122;61mopenclaw --dev gateway[39m
    [38;2;139;127;119mRun a dev Gateway (isolated state/config) on ws://127.0.0.1:19001.[39m
  [38;2;255;122;61mopenclaw gateway --force[39m
    [38;2;139;127;119mKill anything bound to the default gateway port, then start it.[39m
  [38;2;255;122;61mopenclaw gateway ...[39m
    [38;2;139;127;119mGateway control via WebSocket.[39m
  [38;2;255;122;61mopenclaw agent --to +15555550123 --message "Run summary" --deliver[39m
    [38;2;139;127;119mTalk directly to the agent using the Gateway; optionally send the WhatsApp reply.[39m
  [38;2;255;122;61mopenclaw message send --channel telegram --target @mychat --message "Hi"[39m
    [38;2;139;127;119mSend via your Telegram bot.[39m

[38;2;139;127;119mDocs:[39m ]8;;https://docs.openclaw.ai/clidocs.openclaw.ai/cli]8;;
